vanta.body:
From the AI vendors you use to the AI features you build, your risk surface is expanding faster than most programs were built to handle.

Today at Vanta Delivers, we introduced new capabilities that provide you a unified view across your risk program, so you can lean into AI with confidence. 

Here's what we announced ⬇️

The Agent for TPRM handles the heavy lifting on vendor assessments, gathering evidence, pre-filling questionnaires, and flagging responses that need a human to weigh in. Multiple Assessments per Vendor lets security, legal, privacy, and AI reviews run concurrently for the same vendor, each with their own owner, all rolling up into one decision. And Continuous Vendor Monitoring surfaces incidents the moment they're detected with enough context to act on them fast.

The Agent for Risk connects each risk to the assets, controls, and vendors associated with it, so risk owners can move from surfacing a problem to acting on it without starting from zero. That includes mapping risk to assets, vendors, and controls.

On the internal risk side, our AI risk library will give teams a structured starting point for governing AI tools already running inside their org. Factor-Based Inherent Scoring layers on, so you can assess risk across financial, operational, reputational, and other dimensions. And Automated Residual Risk Scoring updates your scores automatically as controls change.

Check out the highlight reel, then see more on our latest updates: https://lnkd.in/e_Jvmpfr
vanta.headline: Vanta Delivers: Live from NY Recap

vanta.body:
The numbers on shadow AI are worse than most people think. 

According to our own data, 70% of Vanta's 16K+ customers have AI tools running inside their organizations that haven't gone through formal security review. 

I met with leaders at a multinational GSI last week and they laughed at this and said "Understatement! Every company is suffering from this risk!"

Meanwhile, companies are only reviewing 7% of their AI vendors, even though 30% of them are critical or high risk. And 88% of risks go unremediated. Yikes. 😬 

We built the Vanta Agent for Risk because the way organizations work has fundamentally changed, and the tools security teams use to manage risk haven't kept up. 

The agent maps vendors, tools, data, controls, and compliance responsibilities into one continuously updated picture, so the risks that were previously invisible become visible, and actionable.

Harry McCracken at Fast Company spent time with our team digging into all of it: 

https://lnkd.in/ge-jetAW
vanta.headline: 'Shadow AI' is real. Vanta wants to help manage it

vanta.body:
Sometimes unlimited tokens and rippin' guitar riffs can't solve every problem. 

The best builders know what NOT to build. Vibe coding might cut down on time, but that's only a fraction (20%) of the total software lifecycle cost. 

The other 70–80%? Maintenance, security patches, compliance updates. The slow grind of keeping it alive in production.

When it comes to something as complex and critical as keeping your security airtight, depth wins over speed every time. 

New episode of Security Theater with Alexis Gay just dropped!👇
vanta.headline: When it comes to something as complex and critical as keeping your security airtight, depth wins over speed every time.

vanta.body:
Vanta has been named to the 2026 CNBC #Disruptor50 list of the most innovative private companies 🎉

AI is changing how companies build, sell, and prove they can be trusted. We built Vanta to meet that moment, and today 16,000+ customers rely on us to manage compliance, third-party risk, and security in one place.

Grateful for every customer, partner, and teammate who got us here.

See the full list: https://cnb.cx/4dm76uQ

drata.body: From audit readiness to customer assurance, Drata helps companies reduce manual work with AI-powered automation for evidence collection, control monitoring, and trust workflows.
drata.headline: The smarter way to scale trust

drata.body: Drata brings compliance automation, enterprise GRC, trust center, questionnaire automation, and third-party risk into one platform so teams can move faster, stay audit-ready, and build trust at every stage of growth.
drata.headline: Continuous trust starts here

drata.body:
Help your team stay audit-ready without the stress.

Drata centralizes evidence, automates monitoring, and keeps your compliance frameworks up to date. No more scrambling through spreadsheets, just clean, credible proof of your security posture.

Book a 1:1 demo today and see how Drata simplifies compliance.
drata.headline: Strengthen Your Compliance

drata.body:
PDFs go stale fast. Your security posture doesn't have to.

Give prospects real-time insight into compliance status so your team can close trust gaps quickly and confidently.

Book a 1:1 demo with one of our experts.
drata.headline: Expedite Security Reviews

drata.body:
When risk, compliance, and audit workflows live in different tools, you lose both efficiency and visibility.

Spreadsheets, tickets, and siloed systems make it nearly impossible to stay audit-ready or scale confidently.

Brex faced the same challenge.

With Drata, they brought everything into one place:

✅ Control monitoring, internal audits, and vendor risk fully centralized

✅ Real-time visibility across frameworks like SOC 2, ISO, and PCI

✅ Automated workflows replacing manual, reactive processes

See their transformation and results. Read the case study."
drata.headline: Drata x Brex: Case Study
